Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 400}When you turn Network Functions on and press {f 1 3 109}, you can review online player statistics and compare progress.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Pressing {f 1 3 109} may also provide tips if you're stuck, or recommend actions if you can't decide what to do.[n]{f 1 1}
